title: Building Claude Skills
description: The complete guide to building effective Skills for Claude — what a skill is, the SKILL.md structure and YAML frontmatter, planning and design, testing and iteration, distribution, and proven patterns. Converted from Anthropic's official PDF.
tagline: Everything you need to build effective Skills for Claude — structure, the all-important SKILL.md frontmatter, planning, testing, distribution, and the patterns that work.
learn: What a skill is and the three-level progressive-disclosure model
Technical requirements: file structure and the SKILL.md YAML frontmatter
How to write an effective description field that triggers reliably
How to test triggering, function, and performance — and iterate on feedback
How to distribute skills (Claude.ai, Claude Code, API) and position them
Five proven patterns for standalone and MCP-enhanced skills
